title: The Last Industrial Night
description: The Last Industrial Night is a performance-focused industrial automation modpack set in a world that feels increasingly wrong — where progress never stops, and the darkness never leaves.
body:
# _**Industrial Upgrade**_ -
is not just a technology modpack — it’s a world where progress comes at a cost.

Build machines. Generate power. Expand your industry.
But the more you automate… the more the world begins to feel wrong.

At its core, the pack delivers deep industrial progression through advanced machinery, energy systems, and large-scale automation. Mechanical engineering and kinetic production chains allow you to transform raw resources into fully automated industrial networks.

Yet beneath the surface of efficiency and order lies something else.

The world feels quieter. Stranger. Less predictable.

Subtle horror elements reshape the atmosphere of exploration. Darkness feels heavier. Silence feels longer. Strange events interrupt the routine of progress. With **Broken Script** and **No Moon**, the familiar Minecraft world becomes tense, unsettling, and uncertain — as if something is always just out of sight.

This is a modpack about control… and the slow realization that you may not have it.

---
# REQUIRED MOD: 
https://modrinth.com/mod/the-broken-script

https://modrinth.com/mod/the-broken-script

https://modrinth.com/mod/the-broken-script

CONFIGS ARE INCLUDED IN PACK
---

### ⚙️ Features

* Deep industrial and technological progression
* Complex automation and mechanical engineering
* A tense, atmospheric world with subtle horror elements
* Performance-optimized gameplay for large automated systems
* Quality-of-life improvements and enhanced visual immersion

---

### 🚀 Performance

Carefully selected optimization mods ensure smooth gameplay, stable performance, and efficient memory usage — even with massive factories and complex automation networks.

---

### ❗ Required Datapack

This modpack requires an external datapack to function properly:
https://modrinth.com/project/p1WH6sHr

---

### 🎯 Designed for players who want:

* Meaningful technological progression
* Immersive and atmospheric gameplay
* Large-scale automation and engineering challenges
* A world that feels alive… and watching

Build your industry.
Expand your machines.
Ignore the feeling that something changed.
